body: Updated because there was some conflicted versions in deps
author: klensy

body: This started saying about not found `winapi::um::timezoneapi` until added this feature. Looks like previously it was imported via `time` crate?
author: klensy

body: Used https://docs.rs/time/0.3.5/time/struct.OffsetDateTime.html#method.now_utc, but maybe https://docs.rs/time/0.3.5/time/struct.OffsetDateTime.html#method.now_local should be used instead?
author: klensy

body: What did the previous function do? Let's try to match that.
author: Mark-Simulacrum

body:
Looking at description at 0.1.x [version](https://docs.rs/time/0.1.44/time/fn.now.html), it says `Returns the current time in the local timezone`, so i guess it is.
From 0.3.6 (https://github.com/time-rs/time/blob/main/CHANGELOG.md#036-2022-01-20) `now_local` can be used again on more platforms.
author: klensy
